title: Epitaph - In Obitum M S, X� Maij, 1614
content:
May! Be thou never grac'd with birds that sing,
            Nor Flora's pride!
    In thee all flowers and roses spring,
            Mine only died.

    W. B.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Browne delivers a powerful performance in "Epitaph - In Obitum M S, X� Maij, 1614"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
